charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake company names and other company bits

Source: R/company.R
ch_company.Rd

Create fake company names and other company bits

ch_company(n = 1, locale = NULL)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
locale

(character) the locale to use. See CompanyProvider$new()$allowed_locales() for locales supported.

See also

CompanyProvider

Examples

ch_company()

#> [1] "Carter, Carter and Carter"
ch_company(10)

#>  [1] "Stroman Group"                   "Hickle, Hickle and Hickle"      
#>  [3] "Simonis-Simonis"                 "Hilpert, Hilpert and Hilpert"   
#>  [5] "Greenfelder-Greenfelder"         "Harber, Harber and Harber"      
#>  [7] "Kuhn, Kuhn and Kuhn"             "Hoppe-Hoppe"                    
#>  [9] "Kuhic-Kuhic"                     "Prosacco, Prosacco and Prosacco"
ch_company(500)

#>   [1] "Legros Group"                                  
#>   [2] "Anderson-Anderson"                             
#>   [3] "Smitham, Smitham and Smitham"                  
#>   [4] "Crist Group"                                   
#>   [5] "Hirthe-Hirthe"                                 
#>   [6] "Swift-Swift"                                   
#>   [7] "Toy, Toy and Toy"                              
#>   [8] "Gleichner and Sons"                            
#>   [9] "Greenfelder-Greenfelder"                       
#>  [10] "Hilll, Hilll and Hilll"                        
#>  [11] "Bode, Bode and Bode"                           
#>  [12] "Mayert PLC"                                    
#>  [13] "Flatley and Sons"                              
#>  [14] "Nader, Nader and Nader"                        
#>  [15] "Mills-Mills"                                   
#>  [16] "Klocko and Sons"                               
#>  [17] "Dibbert-Dibbert"                               
#>  [18] "Koelpin-Koelpin"                               
#>  [19] "Senger and Sons"                               
#>  [20] "Tillman Inc"                                   
#>  [21] "Shields-Shields"                               
#>  [22] "Stark, Stark and Stark"                        
#>  [23] "Ondricka-Ondricka"                             
#>  [24] "Schneider-Schneider"                           
#>  [25] "Kertzmann Ltd"                                 
#>  [26] "Schmidt, Schmidt and Schmidt"                  
#>  [27] "Schiller-Schiller"                             
#>  [28] "Kunze Ltd"                                     
#>  [29] "Gutmann Ltd"                                   
#>  [30] "Grant-Grant"                                   
#>  [31] "Lesch, Lesch and Lesch"                        
#>  [32] "Murphy Ltd"                                    
#>  [33] "Bode-Bode"                                     
#>  [34] "Ledner-Ledner"                                 
#>  [35] "Waelchi, Waelchi and Waelchi"                  
#>  [36] "McGlynn, McGlynn and McGlynn"                  
#>  [37] "Senger, Senger and Senger"

#>  [40] "Daugherty-Daugherty"                           
#>  [41] "Treutel-Treutel"

ch_company(locale = "fr_FR", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Sauvage S.A.R.L."        "Bousquet et Fils"       
#>  [3] "Boulay Boulay SARL"      "Rolland Rolland et Fils"
#>  [5] "Prévost Prévost S.A."    "Mahe"                   
#>  [7] "Leroux et Fils"          "Albert"                 
#>  [9] "Hubért"                  "Francois et Fils"       
ch_company(locale = "cs_CZ", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Novák Novák a.s."     "Pospíšil s.r.o."      "Šťastný s.r.o."      
#>  [4] "Král Král o.s."       "Štěpánková a.s."      "Jandová s.r.o."      
#>  [7] "Bartoš a.s."          "Novotný Novotný o.s." "Marek Marek s.r.o."  
#> [10] "Čermáková"           
ch_company(locale = "es_MX", n = 10)

#>  [1] " -"                  " y  S.C."            "-"                  
#>  [4] " y  S. R.L. de C.V." " ,  y "              "- A.C."             
#>  [7] "- S.A. de C.V."      "  y "                "-"                  
#> [10] " -"                 
ch_company(locale = "hr_HR", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Ciganović"                        "Klarić j.d.o.o."                 
#>  [3] "Medved Medved d.o.o."             "Matijević Matijević d.d."
